description: Dental practices — general dentistry, cosmetic, Invisalign/orthodontics, implants, pediatric, emergency, sedation dentistry.

bullets: Hook: "New to the area? First exam + cleaning, $59." New-patient acquisition is the entire job
Format: Short reel of the office tour + smiling staff — trust is the conversion blocker, not price
CTA: "Book Your First Visit" — Meta Lead Form beats site click for new patients in this niche
Offer: New-patient special ($59–$99 exam + X-rays + cleaning) with insurance acceptance highlighted
Angle: Geo-target 5-mile radius around practice; exclude existing-patient list to avoid wasted spend
Hook: "Hate your smile in photos?" Emotional, not clinical — cosmetic is identity-driven
Format: Before/after carousel — real patients only, never stock photos, drives 2–3× the CTR
CTA: "Get a Smile Design Consultation" — premium framing, never "book a cleaning"
Offer: Free digital smile preview / 3D mockup — soft entry to a $15K+ case
Angle: Women 28–55, income 75K+, life events (wedding, divorce, milestone birthday) lift response
Hook: "Straight teeth in 6 months — no metal, no awkward photos."
Format: Time-lapse smile transformation video (with patient consent) — highest-performing format in this niche
CTA: "See If You're a Candidate" — quiz-style lead capture outperforms direct booking
Offer: Free Invisalign consult + scan; in-house financing from $X/month makes the $5K case affordable
Angle: Split campaigns: adult professional 25–45 vs parent-buying-for-teen 35–55 — completely different copy
Hook: "Tired of dentures slipping? Implants give you your bite back." Functional pain beats vanity here
Format: Long-form video testimonial — implants are a 6–12 month consideration cycle, build trust deep
CTA: "Book a Free Implant Consultation" + sedation reassurance in the ad copy
Offer: Free 3D CBCT scan with consult (normally $300) — removes friction, signals tech credibility
Angle: Target 55+, retarget aggressively (90-day window), exclude implants-already-done audiences
Hook: "Make your kid's first dental visit a happy one." — emotional reassurance to parents
Format: Short video of a kid laughing in the chair with toy/prize wall in frame — sells the experience
CTA: "Book Their First Visit" — gentle, never urgency-driven
Offer: Free first visit for kids under 3, or new-family bundle (2 kids + parent cleaning)
Angle: Target moms 28–42 with parenting interests; school-start (Aug) and post-Halloween (Nov) are peak windows
Hook: "Tooth pain right now? We can see you today." — direct, immediate, no warmth needed
Format: Static image with bold phone number — call-driving creative, click-to-call ads
CTA: "Call Now" — emergency intent is high, click-to-call beats lead-form by 2×
Offer: Same-day appointments + accepted insurance list visible in creative
Angle: 24/7 search-style targeting; bid heaviest evenings, weekends, holidays when GPs are closed
Hook: "Avoided the dentist for years? You're not alone — and you can sleep through it."
Format: Patient testimonial video — fear-overcome stories convert anxious avoiders
CTA: "Schedule a No-Pressure Consult" — language matters; "book" feels too committal here
Offer: Free anxiety consultation + IV-sedation pricing transparency in ad
Angle: Layer dental-anxiety + 'haven't been to dentist in 5+ years' lookalike; women 30–55 overindex
